company.name_jp: 株式会社アイルミッション

notes: Found representative director from company profile page.
research_notes: 代表取締役社長 辻高志 found on /company/profile/ page. Founded 2013, 132 employees (as of 2025/4), headquartered in Yokohama with Nagasaki office. Capital: 50M yen. ISO 27001 certified. Member of KIA, NISA, KNBC, IIT, JNSA. No LinkedIn or Twitter/X links found on site.
